---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for booking-core
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request / Funktionsvorschlag

## Problem / Problem

What shared booking problem should this change solve?

Welches gemeinsame Booking-Problem soll diese Aenderung loesen?

## Proposed solution / Vorgeschlagene Loesung

Describe how the API or processor behavior should work.

Beschreibe, wie API oder Processor-Verhalten aussehen sollen.

## Alternatives / Alternativen

Have you considered other approaches?

Gibt es alternative Loesungen?

## Additional context / Weitere Informationen

Add examples, data shapes, or logs if they help explain the request.

Fuege bei Bedarf Beispiele, Datenformen oder Logs hinzu.
